title: Im Weissen Rössl
writer: Horst Budjuhn, Erik Charell, Harry Halm
actors: Johanna Matz, Johannes Heesters, Walter Müller
plot: Leopold, the new head waiter at the 'Weißen Rößl' is in love with the landlady Josefa. He sends her red roses every day. But Josefa believes they are a gift from her regular guest Dr. Otto Siedler, with whom Josefa is in love.
